case_title: JAESON LEANO ET AL VS. NATIONAL CAB CO.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,499.00 FILED BY LEANO, JAESON MALLARI, PEA AS TO DEFENDANT NATIONAL CAB CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-23-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-15-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NATIONAL CAB CO.
